creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
I'm afraid www/squid still can't be used for some configurations.
For example, with ntlm or kerberos authentication.
There is even a ticket in squid's bugzilla about that.
http://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=3997

While www/squid33 doesn't have such problems.

So I plead, please, don't delete www/squid33 from ports tree so soon.
Extend the expiration date.
